Projects.title: Real-Time MPC for Unstable Systems
desc: Designed and implemented real-time Model Predictive Control (MPC) for unstable systems including an inverted pendulum (Qube-Servo 3) and a two-wheeled self-balancing robot.

Deployed controllers using Simulink Real-Time with embedded hardware, enabling constraint handling, disturbance rejection, and high-frequency control execution. Benchmarked against PID for performance evaluation.

Projects.title: Reinforcement Learning for Quadruped Locomotion
desc: Developed learning-based locomotion controller using PPO, TD3, and DDPG for quadruped robot (Petoi Bittle).
Built simulation pipeline in PyBullet and OpenAI Gym, and implemented sim-to-real transfer strategies for deployment.

Projects.title: Vision-Guided Robotic Needle Placement
desc: Developed ROS-based pipeline for 3D perception and motion planning for a 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda robot.
Implemented point cloud processing and trajectory planning using PRM and LSPB for collision-free motion.

Projects.title: Gaussian Process MPC
desc: Developed data-driven Model Predictive Control using Gaussian Processes for uncertainty-aware control.
Integrated learned models into predictive control framework for nonlinear systems.

Projects.title: Bremen Big Data Challenge
desc: Developed machine learning models for biosignal classification and fraud detection using real-world datasets.
Applied Random Forest, LSTM, and CNN models with preprocessing and data augmentation.
